98 AC1C AC1C_OUT_1_WEEK (AC1C) Goes Out 1+ Days a Week CHAR 1 Customary routine: cycle of daily events - goes out one or more days a week. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
99 AC1D AC1D_STAY_BUSY (AC1D) Stays Busy With Hobbies/Reading/Fixed Daily Routine CHAR 1 Customary routine: cycle of daily events - stys busy with hobbies/fixed routine. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
